# SEO & AI SEO Workflow

## 1. Traditional SEO Techniques
*   **Semantic HTML:** Strict use of HTML5 tags (header, nav, article, footer) for better crawler readability.
*   **Meta Tags & Open Graph:** Dynamic meta titles and descriptions for every product (pastries, cakes). Open Graph tags for beautiful sharing on WhatsApp and social media.
*   **Structured Data (Schema.org):** Implementing `Product`, `LocalBusiness`, and `BreadcrumbList` schemas so search engines rich-display ratings, prices, and stock status.
*   **Sitemap & Robots.txt:** Auto-generated XML sitemaps to ensure all categories and items are indexed.

## 2. AI SEO Implementations
*   **Dynamic Content Generation:** Utilizing AI to auto-generate unique, compelling product descriptions for new menu items, improving long-tail keyword targeting.
*   **Personalized Recommendations:** "Customers who bought this cake also loved these macarons" - AI-driven cross-selling to increase session duration (a positive SEO signal).
*   **Semantic Search Engine:** Implementing an AI-based search bar that understands natural language (e.g., "eggless chocolate birthday cake for kids") rather than relying on exact keyword matches.
